title: symlink workdir without target dir fails.
body:
**Description**
Reported by @karelyatin in #1565

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
```
# cat ~/Dockerfile
FROM alpine
#RUN mkdir /var/lib/tempest
RUN ln -sf /var/lib/tempest /tempest
WORKDIR /tempest
RUN touch /etc/notareal.conf
RUN chmod 664 /etc/notareal.conf

# buildah bud -t tom -f ~/Dockerfile .
```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
# buildah bud -t tom -f ~/Dockerfile .
STEP 1: FROM alpine
STEP 2: RUN ln -sf /var/lib/tempest /tempest
STEP 3: WORKDIR /tempest
STEP 4: RUN touch /etc/notareal.conf
container_linux.go:345: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:424: container init caused \"mkdir /tempest: file exists\""
error running container: error creating container for [/bin/sh -c touch /etc/notareal.conf]: : exit status 1
error building at STEP "RUN touch /etc/notareal.conf": error while running runtime: exit status 1

```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Successful build.

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
# buildah version 
Version:         1.9.0-dev
Go Version:      go1.12.2
Image Spec:      1.0.0
Runtime Spec:    1.0.0
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  v0.7.0-rc2
Git Commit:      5dc376c3
Built:           Thu May  2 15:55:48 2019
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64

```
